productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Boys Black Shorts
description: CompositionBlack shorts made of 100% cotton, has two insert pockets on the sides, two patch pockets on the sides above the hem with velcro closures, a ribbed and elasticated waistband with drawstrings and stitch detailingFitRegularWash careMachine wash delicate in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach, scrub, wring, tumble dry or dry cleanDry flat in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsGet your little one up and about in a pair of shorts that play as hard as he does from united colors of benetton. Team this with a T-shirt and comfy footwear when you take him out the next time. The soft cotton fabric will keep him feeling fresh and comfortable all day long, while he enjoys the outing in style.
